message:
feat(disclosure): track slice count for pack mode disclosures

- Add slices_included field to DisclosedContent for proper slice tracking
- Set actual slice count from packer results instead of hardcoded TODO
- Load.rs now uses disclosed.slices_included directly
- agent_mail: add HTTP warning and stricter error handling
- updater: use streaming SHA256 for memory efficiency

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -520,7 +520,7 @@ fn try_improve(
         return false;
     }
 
-    let mut ranked = rank_by_density(
+    let ranked = rank_by_density(
         &candidates,
         &group_counts,
         &constraints.recent_slice_ids,
